raw_consumer_statement: Bought a vacation on XXXX ( the property was line properties ) with my XXXX Citi card totaling ( {$2700.00} ). The company charged me 3 times. Citi credited back one of the three times fully ( {$2700.00} ) and half of a credit for the other charge ( {$790.00} XX/XX/XXXX and {$1100.00} XX/XX/XXXX ), but they will not refund the remaining amount for the second charge ( XXXX ). Ive called them every single month since XXXX and they cant seem to explain to me why they cant or wont refund it but I have been trying to get a refund since XX/XX/XXXX. Every person Ive talk to says that they can see where I was overcharged and that I should get a refund and that the codes that theyre putting into their system should allow for a refund to be given, but I still have not been refunded the full credit. Ive exhausted all options and the company says they only charged us once, so I dont know if Citi just charged me that or if the company charged me that but Im not sure what else to do. They have extensive documentation of this.
